summary: Frontend-only iteration. Tested new SafetyProtocol section (between Hero and BeforeAfter) + replaced video URLs (Pixabay → Mixkit). All 8 requested checks pass. No regressions detected: configurator and contact forms successfully POST /api/leads (200), before/after slider drags correctly, gallery horizontal scroll present, 0 console errors at desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844).

issues:
The
between 'Протокол' and 'безопасной' visually renders correctly, but textContent serializes without a space ('Протоколбезопасной оклейки.') — purely cosmetic for automated text comparison, not a visual issue.

critical_code_review_comments: DUPLICATE data-testid in SafetyProtocol.jsx: protocol-stage-01/02/03 are rendered TWICE (once inside the `hidden md:block` desktop horizontal scroll container and once inside the `md:hidden` mobile vertical container). Both share the same testid, so 6 DOM nodes exist with 3 distinct testids. Tests using page.query_selector pick whichever is first in DOM; this works because the inactive one is hidden via CSS but breaks the uniqueness contract. Recommend suffixing with '-desktop' / '-mobile' or rendering only one tree based on a media-query hook.

SafetyProtocol StageCard uses background <video autoPlay loop muted /> for EACH of the 3 cards rendered twice = up to 6 simultaneous mp4 streams on mobile. Consider lazy mounting / IntersectionObserver to load video only when card enters viewport to reduce bandwidth & decode cost on low-end devices.

Section id='protocol' is added but the navigation menu (Navigation.jsx) was NOT updated to expose this anchor in the menu — links shown are #services, #configurator, #process, #gallery, #contact. If the protocol section is intended to be reachable from the nav, add a link.
seed_data_creation: Created two TEST_ lead rows via UI form submission: TEST_Anna (configurator) and TEST_Boris (contact form). Both returned 200 with valid UUID ids.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested checks for iteration 2 confirmed: SafetyProtocol renders (desktop horizontal sticky + mobile vertical fallback), 3 stages each with 4 bullets, DOM order hero→protocol→before-after correct, Hero & AsmrVideo now use assets.mixkit.co, no regressions in forms / BA slider / gallery, no console errors. Minor non-blocking observations captured under critical_code_review_comments (duplicate data-testid across desktop+mobile renders, video performance, missing nav anchor).
rca of the issue: No bugs to RCA — iteration objective met.
